hardBlock.detail: Tagalog still needs durable physical-device evidence for the remaining shared-search debt, and it still has not started the real v2 content-pack lane after that. The shared premium plumbing is ready, but Tagalog-specific store proof is still later work.
hardBlock.nextHumanAction: Use a current Tagalog preview build on device for the shared-search blocker first, then author the first real Tagalog v2 pack before any Tagalog store-proof lane starts.

blockerDetail: Tagalog is still in testing on the older thin 10-scenario / 70-phrase pack. The family premium plumbing now exists and will carry forward automatically, but Tagalog still needs shared-search device proof and then its own real v2 content pass before later App Store work.
nextStep: Resume Tagalog device testing for the shared-search blocker first, then author the first real Tagalog v2 pack on top of the shared schema, export tooling, and inherited premium plumbing.
